sn1.8:1.2: Standing to one side, a devatā addressed the Blessed One with a verse:
sn1.8:2.1: “Those for whom phenomena are thoroughly confused,
sn1.8:2.2: who may be led by the teachings of others:
sn1.8:2.3: Asleep are they; they haven’t awakened.
sn1.8:2.4: It’s time for them to awaken.”
sn1.8:3.1: “Those for whom phenomena are not confused,
sn1.8:3.2: may not be led by the teachings of others.
sn1.8:3.4: they go among the discordant harmoniously.”
